description: Forgive the interruption, sirs. Edgelord was about to write a card-to-card edge between Burden of Proof and Eliminate the Impossible and noticed there is in fact a designer-named canonical faction — the Ravnican Agency of Magicological Investigations, R.A.M.I., founded by the archon Ezrim — that anchors all six MKM detective cards properly. So I, ah, made the node? It's the canonical post-Phyrexian-Invasion cross-guild detective bureau, which is to say, in-universe it is what replaces the ten-guild system that defined Ravnica for twenty years of Wizards' design work. The 'agency' slug beats 'investigation' and 'detective-noir' for ZING per the hubs-hand-curated rule; the faction-character framing beats hub because R.A.M.I. is a specific named institution with named officers (Ezrim, Alquist Proft, Etrata, Kellan, Kaust, Sophia), not a thematic concept. Exit Specialist (MKM-55) deliberately not wired — disguise mechanic is shared by Agency operatives AND the underworld criminals they investigate; flagged as deferred-triage pending story-article confirmation of which side that card is on.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Ravnican Agency of Magicological Investigations]
[Wizards of the Coast: Planeswalker's Guide to Murders at Karlov Manor, Emily Teng 2024-02-01]
[Wizards of the Coast: Magic Story: Murders at Karlov Manor episodes 1-7, Seanan McGuire 2023-12-05 through 2024-01-15]
other_candidates_considered: Hub 'investigation' or 'detective-noir' — rejected. Designer-named faction (R.A.M.I.) beats generic-concept hub per hubs-hand-curated discipline. The Agency is a specific institution with named officers, not a thematic abstraction.

Symbol 'all-seeing-eye-badge' — deferred. The R.A.M.I. badge is canonically the Ravnican-skyline-with-all-seeing-eye device, but corpus cards don't yet depict the badge as foreground iconography. When a card surfaces it as figure-level art (parallel to how Orzhov Signet thrones got the symbol node), the symbol case becomes immediate.

Sub-nodes for Ezrim, Alquist Proft, Etrata, Kellan, Kaust, Sophia, Tam Sennic — deferred. None depicted in current corpus prints (corpus carries generic-archetype Agency operatives, not the named-legendary printings). Parallels the Ral-Zarek-under-Izzet-League pattern: sub-node when the named-legendary printing lands.
Exit Specialist (MKM-55) wiring — deferred-triage. Disguise mechanic is faction-ambiguous; could be Agency or could be underworld.
